Back to Recipes

Tofu Tikka Masala

Ingredients

  • 2 Tsp Garam Masala
  • 4 Tsp Paprika
  • 1 Tsp Coriander
  • ½ Tsp Black Pepper
  • 1 Tsp Salt
  • 1/2 Tsp Turmeric
  • 1 Tsp Cumin
  • 1 Red Bell Pepper
  • 3 Tbsp Nutritional Yeast
  • 6 Tbsp Tomato Paste
  • 400ml Chopped Tomatoes (Canned)
  • 400ml Coconut Milk
  • 180g Mushrooms
  • 400g Chickpeas
  • 1 Tbsp Lemon Juice

Instructions

  1. Chop tofu, drain liquid and put aside to dry.
  2. Add oil, cumin (1 Tsp) and salt (1 Tsp) into the pan and fry for 1 minute.
  3. Add ginger and chili and fry for another minute.
  4. Add Garam Masala (2 Tsp), Paprika (4 Tsp), Coriander (1 Tsp), Black Pepper (½ Tsp) and Turmeric (½ Tsp).
  5. Add bell pepper, nutritional yeast, tomato paste and cook for 2 minutes.
  6. Add tomatoes, coconut milk, mushrooms, chickpeas and lemon juice and cook for 4 minutes.
